[ch]Em[/ch]  [ch]A7[/ch]  [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]

[Verse 1]

[tab]     [ch]Em[/ch]                            [ch]A7[/ch]
It's been a long time since you fell in love[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Dmaj[/ch]                                  [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
You ain't coming out yo' shell, you really ain't been yo'self[/tab]

Tell me, what must I do (do tell, my love)?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
'Cause luckily I'm good at reading[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]B7[/ch]
I wouldn't bug him, but he won't stop cheezin'[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab]    [ch]Em[/ch]                  [ch]A7[/ch]

[tab][ch]Dmaj7[/ch]               [ch]Dmaj7[/ch]
If you frontin' I'll be bouncin'[/tab]

[tab]         [ch]B7[/ch]
